ai_summary: Here is the executive summary:  AJMERA REALTY & INFRA INDIA LTD. has divested its entire 36% stake in Ultra Tech Property Developers Private Limited for Rs. 1.73 Crores, resulting in Ultra Tech ceasing to be an associate company. This transaction is financially immaterial to Ajmera Realty, as Ultra Tech contributed negligible revenue (0%) and a minimal percentage (0.06%) to the consolidated net worth. No red flags are apparent, as it was an arm's length sale to an unrelated third party.
